title: Japanese-Style Fried Herring Bento
description: A fusion of Norwegian and Japanese flavors, this dish features crispy fried herring served with steamed rice and a side of savory sauce.
instructions: Rinse the herring under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
Season the flour with salt and pepper, coat the herring in the flour mixture.
Dip the floured herring in the beaten egg, then coat in Panko breadcrumbs.
Heat 1/2-inch of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the breaded herring to the skillet and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the fried herring with steamed rice and a side of savory sauce made by mixing soy sauce and sesame seeds.
Garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
